styleHead: STYLE LOCK: Period gothic live-action, mid-19th-century interiors; candlelight and deep shadows; desaturated cool-gray palette; naturalistic skin and fabric texture; no illustration or stylized animation
castCountLine: CAST COUNT: exactly 2 distinct on-screen character identity(ies) only — Character_The_Narrator, Character_The_Old_Man. Do not invent extra people, duplicate faces, or crowd extras not listed.
actionText: INT. OLD MAN'S BEDCHAMBER - NIGHT. also on screen: Character_The_Old_Man <IMAGE_2>. With a loud yell he throws the lantern wide and leaps into the room. THE OLD MAN shrieks once-once only. THE NARRATOR drags him to the floor and pulls the heavy bed over him. Struggle under the weight-muffled. Then THE NARRATOR stands back, smiling gaily. Under the bed: the heart still beats-muffled, stubborn. ONE continuous take no cut; unbroken cause-to-effect motion. Character_The_Narrator <IMAGE_1> still wears loose dark nightshirt, barefoot, holding lantern Camera directive: Wide chaotic rush as Narrator yells, throws lantern, leaps, drags old man, heaves bed over the struggle. Performance: Acting intensity 10/10: Explosive rage-yell face, insane eyes, then manic gay high-cheek smile Optics: f/2.8 moderate depth of field, dynamic action coverage Color grading: Kodak Vision3 500T 5219, crushed charcoal shadows, cold blue-black tones, single sickly amber lantern ray
prompt:
STYLE LOCK: Period gothic live-action, mid-19th-century interiors; candlelight and deep shadows; desaturated cool-gray palette; naturalistic skin and fabric texture; no illustration or stylized animation

CHARACTER VARIABLES (use these identities consistently; do not redesign faces or wardrobe):
- Character_The_Narrator <IMAGE_1> [The Narrator]: Lean man of middle years (about 40–50), pale sallow skin, hollow cheeks, dark disordered medium-length hair, bright intense dark eyes, thin tense mouth; plain dark wool waistcoat over white shirtsleeves, dark trousers; period clothing. Visual lock: Same lean pale face, dark disordered hair, and bright intense dark eyes in every scene; always plain dark waistcoat and shirtsleeves as default; never elderly, never white-haired, never the filmed blue eye. Voice: Male, middle years; medium-high tense pitch; precise, controlled pace that sharpens into fevered urgency; intimate confessional energy, same voice on-camera and in V.O. Match appearance of reference <IMAGE_1> exactly.
- Character_The_Old_Man <IMAGE_2> [The Old Man]: Frail elderly man, thin stooped build, sparse white hair, deeply lined pale face; one pale blue eye with a dull filmy veil, the other eye ordinary; wears a plain white period nightshirt. Visual lock: Always elderly, white-haired, frail; signature constant is the single pale blue eye with dull filmy veil that must not drift to clear blue or to the Narrator's face; nightshirt is his default on-screen garment. Voice: Elderly male; thin, reedy, low energy; short startled phrases; weak breath support; same fragile voice in the single spoken line and any murmur. Match appearance of reference <IMAGE_2> exactly.

CAST COUNT: exactly 2 distinct on-screen character identity(ies) only — Character_The_Narrator, Character_The_Old_Man. Do not invent extra people, duplicate faces, or crowd extras not listed.

AUDIO: ambient/Foley only — muffled stubborn heartbeat; drag to floor, heavy bed pull, lantern throw, leap, loud yell, muffled struggle, old man shriek. No dialogue.

CONTEXT (prior clip in scene — new cast plate refs attached; match location/lighting if still valid; identity from CHARACTER VARIABLES + locked plates only):
INT. OLD MAN'S BEDCHAMBER - NIGHT. Louder. THE NARRATOR's free hand trembles, then stills. OFF-CAMERA VOICEOVER Character_The_Narrator says "The old man's hour had come!". Character_The_Narrator still wears loose dark nightshirt, barefoot, holding lantern Camera directive: Final pre-strike close-up, Narrator’s eyes decisive: the old man’s hour has come. Performance: Acting intensity 10/10: Lethal calm flood, cold final eyes, grim executioner's mouth line Optics: f/1.4 shallow depth of field, decisive isolation Color grading: Kodak Vision3 500T 5219, crushed charcoal shadows, cold blue-black tones, single sickly amber lantern ray Character_The_Old_Man is on screen.
